query:
-- ─── room_types: Descuento promocional ───────────────────────────────────────
ALTER TABLE room_types
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discountPercent DECIMAL(5,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discountLabel VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discountExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL;

-- ─── room_types: Régimen fiscal ───────────────────────────────────────────────
ALTER TABLE room_types
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fiscalRegime ENUM('reav','general_21','mixed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general_21',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS productType ENUM('own','semi_own','third_party') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'own',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS providerPercent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS agencyMarginPercent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00;

-- ─── room_types: Proveedor y liquidaciones ────────────────────────────────────
ALTER TABLE room_types
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS supplierId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS supplierCommissionPercent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS supplierCostType ENUM('comision_sobre_venta','coste_fijo','porcentaje_margen','hibrido') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'comision_sobre_venta',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS settlementFrequency ENUM('semanal','quincenal','mensual','manual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isSettlable BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;

-- ─── spa_treatments: Descuento promocional ───────────────────────────────────
ALTER TABLE spa_treatments
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discountPercent DECIMAL(5,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discountLabel VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discountExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL;

-- ─── spa_treatments: Régimen fiscal ──────────────────────────────────────────
ALTER TABLE spa_treatments
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fiscalRegime ENUM('reav','general_21','mixed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general_21',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS productType ENUM('own','semi_own','third_party') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'own',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS providerPercent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS agencyMarginPercent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00;

-- ─── spa_treatments: Proveedor y liquidaciones ───────────────────────────────
ALTER TABLE spa_treatments
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS supplierId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS supplierCommissionPercent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS supplierCostType ENUM('comision_sobre_venta','coste_fijo','porcentaje_margen','hibrido') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'comision_sobre_venta',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS settlementFrequency ENUM('semanal','quincenal','mensual','manual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isSettlable BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;
